title: Human meta-review decision
description: A human's pairwise choice, recorded with everything needed to reconstruct what was on screen: the raw left/right click (raw_choice), which arm was presented first (presented_first_arm), the arm run_ids, and the diff blob hash. winner_arm is the chosen arm in true (un-flipped) terms.

labeller.description: github login of the human reviewer

raw_choice.description: the raw keypress: 1/2 for first/second presented, t for tie

presented_first_arm.description: which arm was shown first; combine with raw_choice to recover winner_arm

revised.description: true when this decision supersedes an earlier one for the same pair/labeller

diff_blob.description: sha256 key into blobs/ for the reviewed diff shown

arms.description: run_id of each arm in the pair
